mapper.sql: SELECT t.take_id, t.take_no, t.warehouse_id, w.warehouse_name, t.area_id, a.warehouse_name as area_name, t.take_type, t.sample_ratio, t.cycle_no, t.status, t.plan_date, t.start_time, t.end_time, t.approve_by, t.approve_time, t.del_flag, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, t.remark FROM wms_stock_take t LEFT JOIN wms_warehouse w ON t.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id LEFT JOIN wms_warehouse a ON t.area_id = a.warehouse_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wms_stock_take (take_no, warehouse_id, area_id, take_type, sample_ratio, cycle_no, status, plan_date, create_by, create_time, remark) VALUES (#{takeNo}, #{warehouseId}, #{areaId}, #{takeType}, #{sampleRatio}, #{cycleNo}, #{status}, #{planDate}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete: UPDATE wms_stock_take SET del_flag = '2' WHERE take_id IN #{takeId}
mapper.select: SELECT d.detail_id, d.take_id, d.material_id, m.material_code, m.material_name, d.location_id, l.warehouse_code as location_code, l.warehouse_name as location_name, p.warehouse_name as area_name, d.batch_no, d.book_qty, d.actual_qty, d.diff_qty, d.diff_reason, d.status, d.del_flag, d.create_by, d.create_time, d.update_by, d.update_time, d.remark FROM wms_stock_take_detail d LEFT JOIN wms_material m ON d.material_id = m.material_id LEFT JOIN wms_warehouse l ON d.location_id = l.warehouse_id LEFT JOIN wms_warehouse p ON l.parent_id = p.warehouse_id WHERE d.take_id = #{takeId} AND d.del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wms_stock_take_detail (take_id, material_id, location_id, batch_no, book_qty, actual_qty, diff_qty, diff_reason, status, create_by, create_time, remark) VALUES (#{takeId}, #{materialId}, #{locationId}, #{batchNo}, #{bookQty}, #{actualQty}, #{diffQty}, #{diffReason}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
INSERT INTO wms_stock_take_snapshot (take_id, material_id, location_id, batch_no, snapshot_qty, snapshot_time) VALUES (#{takeId}, #{materialId}, #{locationId}, #{batchNo}, #{snapshotQty}, sysdate())
mapper.select: SELECT snapshot_id, take_id, material_id, location_id, batch_no, snapshot_qty, snapshot_time FROM wms_stock_take_snapshot WHERE take_id = #{takeId}
